background: Determine whether to use a one-sample, paired-sample, or independent-sample $t$ procedure in different experimental scenarios.

task.query: A lab technician obtains a specimen of known concentration from a reference lab. She tests the specimen 10 times using an assay kit and compares the calculated mean to that of the known standard.
A different technician compares the concentration of ten specimens using two different assay kits. Ten measurements are taken with each kit. Results are then compared.
